karpathy.name: Andrej Karpathy
karpathy.headline: AI researcher and educator (ex-OpenAI founding member, ex-Tesla Sr. Director of AI, founder of Eureka Labs)

swyx.name: Shawn Wang
swyx.headline: Founder of Smol AI and AI Engineer; range inferred from an undisclosed Cognition deal, angel activity, and career earnings

crystalhuang.name: Crystal Huang
crystalhuang.headline: General Partner at GV; range inferred from senior venture compensation and carry, with no disclosed personal holdings

cshorten30.name: Connor Shorten
cshorten30.headline: Product researcher at Weaviate; range inferred from career earnings and possible employee equity, neither publicly disclosed

ericzelikman.name: Eric Zelikman
ericzelikman.headline: Humans& co-founder; range inferred from a hypothetical 5–15% stake at the reported $4.48B post-money valuation

jumbld.name: Rohit Agarwal
jumbld.headline: Portkey co-founder and CEO; range inferred from a reported $120M–$140M acquisition and undisclosed founder ownership

mathemagic1an.name: Jay Hack
mathemagic1an.headline: Founder of Codegen and Mira Beauty; range inferred from two acquisitions whose ownership and full proceeds were not disclosed

nathanbenaich.name: Nathan Benaich
nathanbenaich.headline: Founder and solo GP of Air Street Capital; range inferred from management economics and carry across roughly $400M in reported assets under management

saivc_.name: Sai Senthilkumar
saivc_.headline: Partner at Redpoint; range inferred from career compensation and carried interest, with no disclosed personal holdings

tobi.name: Tobi Lütke
tobi.headline: Founder and CEO of Shopify, e-commerce billionaire

gdb.name: Greg Brockman
gdb.headline: OpenAI co-founder and President, holding a 2.5-3% equity stake in the company

rauchg.name: Guillermo Rauch
rauchg.headline: Cofounder and CEO of Vercel; wealth from his equity stake after Vercel's $300M Series F at a $9.3B valuation

id_aa_carmack.name: John Carmack
id_aa_carmack.headline: Co-founder of id Software (Doom, Quake) and former Oculus/Meta CTO; wealth from the 2009 ZeniMax sale and Oculus acquisition

lexfridman.name: Lex Fridman
lexfridman.headline: Podcaster and MIT research scientist; wealth from podcast/YouTube income, no equity stakes found

chamath.name: Chamath Palihapitiya
chamath.headline: Social Capital founder/CEO and All-In podcast host; early Facebook equity, SPAC deals, and a major Groq stake acquired by Nvidia

aaronlevie.name: Aaron Levie
aaronlevie.headline: Box co-founder and CEO; wealth is almost entirely his documented Box (NYSE: BOX) equity stake per SEC Form 4 filings

patio11.name: Patrick McKenzie
patio11.headline: Writer (Bits about Money) and former senior Stripe employee; accumulated high-income savings, no documented equity exit

shl.name: Sahil Lavingia
shl.headline: Founder/CEO of Gumroad; wealth is largely illiquid private equity last priced at a $100M company valuation

suhail.name: Suhail Doshi
suhail.headline: Co-founder/ex-CEO of Mixpanel ($1.05B valuation) and founder of Playground AI; no disclosed personal stake

tszzl.name: roon
tszzl.headline: Pseudonymous OpenAI member of technical staff; range inferred from OpenAI employee equity compensation norms, not personal disclosures

danielgross.name: Daniel Gross
danielgross.headline: Tech entrepreneur/investor (Cue/Apple exit, ex-YC partner, SSI co-founder, NFDG); Meta's tender offer bought out his personal NFDG fund stakes

jason.name: Jason Calacanis
jason.headline: Angel investor and All-In podcast host; ~300+ angel stakes headlined by a $25K Uber bet worth ~$100M+ at IPO
